nodes.name: Nightingale Island finch
nodes.summary: Nightingale Island finch（Nesospiza questi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Nightingale Island finch。

nodes.name: Nightingale Island finch
nodes.summary: The Nightingale Island finch (Nesospiza questi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae (formerly in Emberizidae). It is endemic to Nightingale Island of the Tristan da Cunha archipelago, where its natural habitats are temperate shrubland and subantarctic grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: Nesospiza

nodes.name: VU
